_description: Registry of HiveRunner → external-process HTTP couplings that bind HiveRunner to a process outside its own runtime. Every entry is a silent dependency that breaks HiveRunner's local-first bar because a stranger cloning the repo cannot reach these URLs. New entries require an explicit add to this file; check-external-http-deps.mjs fails CI otherwise. Rule of thumb: the list shrinks over time, never grows silently.
_history: 2026-05-25: Private external dashboard coupling removed from the public HiveRunner surface. Starting baseline: zero entries allowed.
